[SQL EXECUTED: SELECT p.product, COUNT(b.billing_document) AS billing_count
FROM products p
JOIN sales_order_items s ON p.product = s.material
JOIN edges e ON e.source_id = 'ORD-' || s.sales_order AND e.relationship_type = 'BILLED_AS'
JOIN billing_documents b ON e.target_id = 'INV-' || b.billing_document
GROUP BY p.product
ORDER BY billing_count DESC
LIMIT 50]
